payload.answer: SQL admin access is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. The query was not executed, and no memory was read or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: Administrative SQL execution requested, but debug SQL is disabled (BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false). No entity resolution or memory write is appropriate.

details: No memory cards created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in the appropriate debug/admin environment before issuing SQL commands.
Use supported non-SQL Brain admin/debug commands if available.
